chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْأَكْلِ مِنَ الْهَدْيِ الْوَاجِبِ وَ الصَّدَقَةِ مِنْهَا وَ إِخْرَاجِهِ مِنْ مِنًى
chapter_title.en: Chapter 186 – The eating from the sacrificial animal, the Obligatory one, and the giving of the charity from it, and taking it out from Mina

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/182)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/182)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ إِخْرَاجِ لُحُومِ الْأَضَاحِيِّ مِنْ مِنًى فَقَالَ كُنَّا نَقُولُ لَا يُخْرَجْ مِنْهَا شَيْ‏ءٌ لِحَاجَةِ النَّاسِ إِلَيْهِ فَأَمَّا الْيَوْمَ فَقَدْ كَثُرَ النَّاسُ فَلَا بَأْسَ بِإِخْرَاجِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Jameel, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about taking the meat of the slaughtered animal out from Mina. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘We<sup>asws</sup> were saying: ‘Do not take anything out (from Mina) due to the needs of the people for it’. But, as for today, so the people have become numerous, therefore there is no problem with taking it out (from Mina)’.
en.sarwar: 7. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Jamil from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about taking out from Mina’ the meat of the offering animals. He (the Imam) said, ‘We would say that it must not be taken out of Mina’ because people needed. Today, however, the number of people has increased, thus it is not harmful to take out of MinaY”
